title: lotus luteus
intro: Lotus luteus, also known as the common or yellow lotus, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Nelumbo genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of lotus luteus have been associated with several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of lotus luteus can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often used to support overall well-being and prevent diseases.
